case_title: SANDERS, LEO JR. VS HENRY, JEFFERSON DBA JJ SUPER AUTO et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,278.73 FILED BY SANDERS, LEO JR. AS TO DEFENDANT HENRY, JEFFERSON DBA JJ SUPER AUTO RANCHO CPD, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-03-2003 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-03-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-08-2003 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506 MEDIATED SETTLEMENT FOR DISMISSAL. MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE DENIED.
DEFT'S REQUEST TO CHALLENGE VENUE FILED. NOTICE SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HENRY, JEFFERSON DBA JJ SUPER AUTO RANCHO CPD, INC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT HENRY, JEFFERSON DBA JJ SUPER AUTO RANCHO CPD, INC.
CERT MAIL SENT TO FREDERICK W. STEPHENSON AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS RANCHO CPD, INC. RETURNED SIGNED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANDERS, LEO JR. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HENRY, JEFFERSON DBA JJ SUPER AUTO RANCHO CPD, INC. $1,878.00 PRINCIPAL, $62.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,940.00, DEFENDANT HENRY JEFFERSON, DISMISSED; PLAINTIFF TO RETURN TO DEFENDANT RANCHO CPD TWO (2) COMPLETE ENGINES AS PREVIOUSLY DELIVERED TO PLAINTIFF FROM RANCHO CPD. IF PLAINTIFF DOES NOT RETURN ENGINES, DEFENDANT RANCHO CPD TO BE CREDITED $150 PER CORE NOT RETURNED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT RANCHO CPD, INC.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 27509, RECORD TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANDERS, LEO JR. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RANCHO CPD, INC. $338.78 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $360.78, JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 27509 ON 3/18/04 NO EXHIBIT RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
